## New Research

### CAS RFP: Actuarial Frameworks for Climate Risk
- CAS RFP issued March 24, 2026
- Up to $75K awards for research across 5 tracks: perils, practice integration, mitigation investment, insurability, risk transfer
- Proposals due May 22, 2026
- Source: https://www.casact.org/article/request-proposals-developing-actuarial-frameworks-quantify-and-manage-climate-risk | Mar 24, 2026

### MSCI Institute: Climate Risk as Financial Stability Concern
- Physical climate risks increasingly treated as systemic financial stability concern
- US$107B insured nat cat losses in 2025; parametric insurance gaining traction
- Source: Apr 8, 2026

### Swiss Re: 2026 Nat Cat Projections Up to $320B
- Sigma 1/2026: 2025 losses US$107bn; 2026 forecast US$148bn baseline, US$320bn peak
- Secondary perils to drive >65% of avg annual losses by 2030

### Aon: SCS Surpasses Tropical Cyclones
- Severe convective storms overtook tropical cyclones as costliest insurance peril of the 21st century
- US SCS losses expected to grow in 2026

### ISSB IFRS S2 Amendments
- Scope 3 Category 15 (financed emissions) — financial institutions only
- Mandatory CO₂e conversion; location-specific emission factors prioritized
- Effective date: January 1, 2027

### TNFD: 730+ Orgs Committed to 2026 Disclosures
- Growing adoption of TNFD framework for nature-related risk disclosure

### ARC: Africa's First Sovereign Parametric Flood Insurance (Madagascar)
- African Risk Capacity launched parametric flood insurance for Madagascar

### SOA: NGFS Climate Scenarios for Actuarial Assumptions
- Practitioner's framework for applying NGFS climate scenarios to actuarial assumptions
